trending_videos.title: The Five
trending_videos.description: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

trending_videos.title: Resident Evil Requiem - Leon Must Die Forever Free Update Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Leon Must Die Forever is available now as a free update to Resident Evil Requiem!

Unlocked by completing the story, this additional minigame mode challenges you to clear numerous stages as Leon while unlocking exclusive enhancer abilities. The fast-paced action is distinct from the main story mode, and is packed with replay value. Can you make it to the end alive and defeat the boss within the time limit?

Multiple difficulty levels are available, including an extreme high-difficulty mode for only the most confident players. True to the title, you’ll "die forever"...

Resident Evil Requiem is out now on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, Steam, Epic Games Store and GeForce NOW.

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

trending_videos.title: Minnesota Timberwolves at San Antonio Spurs
trending_videos.description: The Timberwolves play the Spurs in the Western Conference semifinals Game 2 at Frost Bank Center. Minnesota leads the series after a narrow Game 1 victory. Victor Wembanyama recorded a historic 12 blocks, an NBA playoff record, and 11 points.

trending_videos.title: Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 – Official Reveal Trailer | IGN First
trending_videos.description:
We're excited to announce that our May IGN First "cover story" is on Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 from Cold Iron and Daybreak Games. You can look forward to several exclusive new reveals on IGN channels spread throughout the month of May, starting with tomorrow's AFE2 trailer premiere and official announcement!

#IGN #Aliens

trending_videos.title: Truist Championship, First Round
trending_videos.description: The first round of the sixth Signature Event on the PGA TOUR takes place at the Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rory McIlroy, the world's second-ranked player, returns as a heavy favorite, having won four times at this venue.

trending_videos.title: Stranger than Heaven - Cast & Story Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
trending_videos.description:

FACE DOWN FATE. 
STRANGER THAN HEAVEN is a fifty-year, action-adventure saga of men with nowhere to go and their desperate struggle to find a home. Use extreme violence to survive, and musical talent to thrive as a showman across five cities and eras of modern Japan. Coming this Winter.

Wishlist Now: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10017939

trending_videos.title: LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Official Launch Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Legends aren’t born — they're built. LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight arrives May 22, 2026. 

Pre-order now: https://legobatmangame.com/   

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a brand-new open world action adventure video game that invites players to embark on Bruce Wayne’s epic journey to become the hero of Gotham City, inspired by decades of Batman films, television, comic books, and games, and jam-packed with Batman nostalgia, DC lore, and TT Games’ signature brand of fun-filled LEGO humor.   

Gotham City’s latest news, in the palm of your hand:
Instagram: https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanInstagram 
Facebook:  https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanFacebook   
TikTok: https://go.wbgames.com/WBGamesTikTok    
X: https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanX 

Follow The LEGO Group:   
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lego/    
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LEGO/    
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LEGO    
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lego    

Follow Batman and DC Comic

trending_videos.title: Star Fox Direct 5.6.2026
trending_videos.description:
The Star Fox Direct is now available to watch on demand! Catch the roughly 15-minute presentation and get the latest details on Star Fox, launching June 25 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=A1013-01&utm_id=A1013-01

creatorPatterns.cross-category potential: Channels like IGN and GameSpot, which focus on gaming, have significant potential to expand into related categories like entertainment, given the overlap in audience interests.

entertainment.insight: High engagement in entertainment trailers indicates strong viewer interest in upcoming series and movies. There is an opportunity to create more behind-the-scenes content or fan theory videos to capitalize on this interest.

gaming.insight: The presence of both official game trailers and story reveals showcases a strong viewer base for gaming content. Expanding into game reviews and live streams could capture additional viewership.

sports.insight: With sports content maintaining a consistent viewership, there is potential to produce more analytical or highlight-focused content, especially around major games or tournaments.

news.insight: Given the engagement with news-related videos, channels can explore in-depth analysis and commentary on current events to provide more value to viewers looking for detailed insights.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
